# BP-117 negative variant: a non-Echo context with Bind is ignored.
lang: go
file: BP-117-variant-safe.go
variant: non-echo
---
package sample

import "fmt"

type Context struct{}

// Bind is a test-only method with a framework-like name.
func (Context) Bind(any) error { return nil }

func remove(ctx Context) error {
	var request struct {
		ID string
	}
	if err := ctx.Bind(&request); err != nil {
		return fmt.Errorf("bind request: %w", err)
	}
	return nil
}
